name: Pawn Shop
description_short: CashCo Pawn Shop is a San Diego-based pawnbroker offering collateral-based loans, merchandise sales, and jewelry services with a BBB A+ rating and 20+ years in operation.
description_long:
CashCo Pawn Shop has operated in San Diego for over 20 years as a full-service pawnbroker with two physical locations. The company positions itself as a community-focused alternative lender specializing in short and long-term financing through collateral-based transactions. Founded on principles of trust and transparency, the business serves customers seeking immediate liquidity without credit checks or traditional loan requirements.

The company offers pawn loans (borrowing against personal items), merchandise sales (selling items directly to the shop), retail shopping of previously pawned and consigned items, jewelry repair, custom jewelry creation, and professional jewelry appraisals. They advertise loan rates below California's statutory requirements and mention providing Military Lending Act (MLA) compliant loans to qualified service members. Their website highlights a current gold sale offering up to 60% discounts and an online inventory shopping platform.

CashCo differentiates itself through industry recognition including a BBB A+ rating, multiple "Best Pawn Shop" awards from A-List, and certification as America's first "green" pawn shop. Their staff includes eight named pawnbrokers and specialists described as "fully trained and experienced." They emphasize customer service quality through testimonials and claim 100% customer satisfaction. The shop offers a "first loan free" promotion and accepts online payments.

As a pawn shop, CashCo provides legitimate collateral-based lending but operates within the pawn industry model where loan amounts are typically conservative percentages of item value and redemption periods are limited (standard 30-90 days). While they advertise competitive rates, pawn loans inherently carry higher effective costs than traditional lending due to short terms and item storage fees. The business model depends on customers either repaying loans or forfeiting collateral, making it suitable only for those with items of sufficient value and genuine ability to repay within the redemption window.
pros: BBB A+ rating and multiple industry awards validate operational legitimacy and customer satisfaction
Loan rates explicitly stated as lower than California legal maximums, suggesting more competitive pricing than required
MLA-compliant loans available for qualified active duty and veteran service members
Offers first pawn loan free, reducing initial borrowing cost for new customers
Eight named, trained pawnbrokers and specialists on staff for professional evaluations
Multiple revenue options (pawn, sell outright, buy/trade) provide flexibility in transactions
Online inventory and payment options add convenience beyond in-store visits
Certified as first "green" pawn shop in America, indicating environmental responsibility
cons: As a pawn shop, loan terms are typically 30-90 days, requiring quick repayment or loss of collateral
Loan amounts are conservative percentages of item value (typically 40-60%), limiting liquidity for most items
No explicit APR or interest rate ranges published on website, making cost comparison difficult
Pawn loans do not build credit history or report to credit bureaus, unlike traditional loans
Dependent on customer having items of sufficient value; not accessible to those without pawnable collateral
best_for: People needing immediate short-term cash ($500-$5,000) with items of value to collateralize
Customers seeking non-credit-based lending without background or credit checks
Military service members qualifying for MLA-compliant loans with rate protections
Individuals wanting to sell jewelry, gold, or electronics at fair market prices
diagnosis: CashCo Pawn Shop is best for customers with items of value who need quick cash within 30-90 days and can reliably repay, or who want to sell jewelry and collectibles without credit qualification. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are short-term products with limited liquidity potential and high effective costs compared to traditional loans; they should not be relied upon for long-term financial needs or by those unable to repay within the redemption window.
services: Merchandise selling (sell items directly to shop)
Professional jewelry appraisals and free evaluations
